title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
summary: The Trump administration has requested that OpenAI delay GPT-5.6's public release, pushing instead for a limited preview accessible only to enterprise customers with case-by-case government approval. The request reflects the administration's concerns about security risks posed by the advanced model.
content: penAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of to the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

zh.title: 白宫要求OpenAI放慢新模型发布速度，出于安全考虑
zh.summary: 特朗普政府要求OpenAI延迟GPT-5.6的公开发布，转而推进仅限企业客户在逐案获得政府批准后才能访问的有限预览。该请求反映了该政府对先进模型所带来的安全风险的担忧。

title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Apple products including the Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3 are discounted during Prime Day, with several items reaching new low prices. The deals are particularly valuable as Apple recently raised prices on Macs and iPads, making this an opportune time to purchase hardware at previous price points.
content:
The latest iPad Air is still available at its pre-price hike discount. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its third day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179. With Apple recently raising prices on several Macs and iPads, now may be one of the last chances to pick up the company’s hardware before those increases fully take effect. Some retailers are still offering discounts based on the previous list prices, making today’s deals even better. With that in mind, we’ve added several new tablet and laptop deals below.
Below are the best Apple deals currently available. Some are exclusive to Prime Day, while others are simply great discounts we think are worth highlighting. We’ll continue updating this guide throughout Prime Day, highlighting more deals as they become available.
Earbud and headphone deals
AirPods Pro 3
The latest AirPods Pro offer improved noise cancellation and richer bass, along with built-in heart sensors that work with Apple’s Fitness app to monitor calories burned across more than 50 workouts. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $249 $179 at Walmart
 $249 $179.99 at Best Buy

The AirPods 4 are on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for around $99 ($30 off). Apple’s entry-level earbuds offer richer bass than previous generations along with a more robust IP54 rating for water and dust resistance. They match the latest AirPods Pro in voice call quality and work well with other Apple devices too, though they lack more advanced features like active noise cancellation. It might be a pro or con to some that this model simply rests in your ear. They don’t create a tight seal like the AirPods Pro.
The AirPods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation and wireless charging are also on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for $148

zh.title: 今年Prime Day苹果产品优惠是我见过最好的
zh.summary: Apple Watch Series 11和AirPods Pro 3等苹果产品在Prime Day期间享受折扣，多件商品达到历史新低价格。由于苹果最近提高了Mac和iPad的价格，这些优惠特别有价值，为消费者提供了以之前价格购买硬件的绝佳时机。

title: Android 17’s new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
summary: Android 17 introduces a dedicated gaming mode for foldable devices that displays a virtual gamepad with D-pad, action buttons, and analog sticks on half the screen. The feature is designed to improve gaming compatibility with any game supporting physical controller input.
content:
Android 17 is getting a dedicated gaming mode for foldables that will put a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half of your screen to theoretically make it easier to play games.
With foldable gaming mode, which is set to launch in the coming months, the virtual controller emulates physical button presses at a system level and is designed to work "with any game that supports physical controllers," says Google's Mishaal Rahman on Reddit. For the actual inputs, the virtual controller will have a D-pad; left and right virtual sticks; A, B, X, and Y buttons; L1, L2, L3; R1, R2, and R3; and a start button. And you'll be able to configure the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Android 17的新折叠屏游戏模式可能会让翻盖手机更有趣
zh.summary: Android 17为折叠屏设备引入了专门的游戏模式，在屏幕的一半上显示虚拟游戏手柄，包括D-pad、动作按钮和模拟摇杆。该功能旨在改进与任何支持物理控制器输入的游戏的兼容性。

title: YouTube updates Shorts to make it even more like TikTok
summary: YouTube Shorts is adopting TikTok-inspired features including a clear-screen mode that hides UI elements, replacing the thumbs-up button with heart icons, and introducing 2x playback speed capability. Users can adjust speed by holding the screen edge or swiping to lock it at faster speeds.
content:
YouTube is adding even more TikTok-like features to Shorts, including a new "clear screen" mode that removes the icons and text from the video you're watching. In a blog post on Thursday, YouTube says it's also replacing the "thumbs-up" button with a "heart" icon, and is introducing a new option that lets you watch Shorts at 2x speed.
As noted by YouTube, you can speed up a video by holding down the edge of your screen and lifting your finger when you want it to return to normal speed. You can lock the speed at 2x by pressing the player and swiping down. Another change allows you to mute watching by tapping the video and selecting the "mute …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube更新Shorts以使其更像TikTok
zh.summary: YouTube Shorts正在采用TikTok灵感的功能，包括隐藏UI元素的清屏模式、用心形图标替代竖起大拇指按钮，以及引入2倍播放速度功能。用户可以通过按住屏幕边缘或滑动来调整速度，使其锁定在更快的速度。

title: YouTube Shorts are getting even shorter with an update that lets you double the playback speed
summary: YouTube Shorts is undergoing updates to enhance its short-form video experience with new playback speed options. The changes continue YouTube's competitive positioning in the growing short-form video market.
content: YouTube Shorts is getting a makeover.

zh.title: YouTube Shorts推出新功能：将播放速度提高一倍，让您享受更快的观看体验
zh.summary: YouTube Shorts推出更新以增强短视频体验，提供新的播放速度选项。这一变化继续巩固了YouTube在不断增长的短视频市场中的竞争地位。

title: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
summary: OpenAI is delaying GPT-5.6's general release following Trump administration requests, opting instead for a limited preview available only to enterprise customers. The administration will review and approve access requests on a case-by-case basis.
content:
The Trump administration, apprehensive of potential security issues, has reportedly asked OpenAI to stagger the release of its next big-ticket model, GPT-5.6. 
The Information reported that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told employees Wednesday in a company Q&A that it would release GPT-5.6 in limited preview form - granting access only to a small group of enterprise customers - in compliance with a request from the federal government. During that preview period, the Trump administration itself would reportedly approve access for customers on a case-by-case basis.
It's a more favorable deal than the Trump administration gave OpenAI rival Anthropic …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在特朗普政府要求后，OpenAI推迟GPT-5.6发布
zh.summary: 在特朗普政府的要求下，OpenAI推迟了GPT-5.6的正式发布，改为仅向企业客户提供有限的预览版本。政府将以逐案审核和批准访问请求的方式进行管理。

title: Framework has good news and bad news
summary: Framework Laptop 13 Pro preorders will receive upgraded SSDs at lower prices after securing cheaper PCIe Gen 5 drives from supplier Adata. Customers originally ordering 500GB configurations now receive 1TB, with new 1TB and 2TB options also available.
content:
Thanks to the component crisis, it's a bad time to want a new computer. But if you are waiting on a preorder for the Framework Laptop 13 Pro - which Framework's CEO has called the "MacBook Pro for Linux users" - the company shared good news on Thursday that might mean yours will cost less than you expected. The company announced that it has secured cheaper new PCIe Gen 5 SSDs from its supplier, Adata, and if you had put in an order for a configuration with a 500GB SSD, you'll now get a 1TB SSD at a lower price. Framework also said you can also now order configurations with the new 1TB or 2TB SSDs onboard, though I'm not seeing them in the DI …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Framework带来好消息和坏消息
zh.summary: Framework笔记本电脑13 Pro的预订客户将获得升级的固态硬盘且价格更低，公司从供应商Adata获得了更便宜的PCIe Gen 5驱动器。原本订购500GB配置的客户现在可以获得1TB，并提供新的1TB和2TB选项。

title: Microsoft adds another year to Windows 10 extended update program
summary: Microsoft is extending Windows 10 extended support for an additional year as approximately 25 percent of PCs still run the aging operating system. The extension provides more time for users to migrate to newer versions.
content: About a quarter of PCs are still running Microsoft's previous operating system.

zh.title: 微软为Windows 10扩展更新计划再增加一年
zh.summary: 由于约25%的PC仍在运行老旧的操作系统，微软将Windows 10扩展支持延长一年。此延期为用户迁移到更新版本提供了更多时间。

title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
summary: Patronus AI, an agent-testing startup founded by former Meta AI researchers, has raised $50 million to develop stress-testing platforms for AI agents. The funding reflects surging market demand for tools that validate AI system reliability.
content: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

zh.title: Patronus AI获得5000万美元融资，建设用于压力测试AI代理的"数字世界"
zh.summary: 由前Meta AI研究人员创办的代理测试初创公司Patronus AI已筹集5000万美元，用于开发AI代理压力测试平台。此融资反映了对验证AI系统可靠性工具的市场需求激增。

title: Score a discounted Xbox console before the prices jump
summary: Xbox Series S and Series X consoles are available at discounted prices before Microsoft raises costs across all Xbox models in August due to surging memory and storage prices. Current deals offer savings of $76-$99, with the Series X disc model dropping to $573.
content:
The Xbox Series S and Series X consoles together. | Photo by Vjeran Pavic / The Verge	

Microsoft announced today that the price of all Xbox models will rise in August, the second time in less than a year as memory prices continue to wreak havoc on every industry from cars to computing. Thankfully, we’re already out looking for Prime Day deals, and we were able to find some discounts on both the Xbox Series S and Xbox Series X ahead of the price hikes.
Microsoft Xbox Series X
The Xbox Series X is Microsoft’s flagship console, serving as its most powerful (and biggest) option focused on fast, 4K gameplay. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $649.99 $573 at Walmart (1TB, disc drive)
 $649.99 $573.99 at Target (1TB, disc drive)

The 1TB Xbox Series X is discounted to $573 and $573.99 at Walmart and Target respectively, a significant reduction from the usual $649.99 price point. This is the model with a built-in 4K Blu-ray player that will go up to $799.99 in just over a month — and it’s what I’d recommend if you’re shopping for a new console to play GTA VI on later this year.
Xbox Series S
The Xbox Series S is smaller than the 4K-capable Xbox Series X, but it can still play the same digital games — albeit topping out at 2560 x 1440 QHD resolution. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $399.99 $349.99 at Dell (512GB)

If you’re just looking for the disc-free Xbox Series S, which is usually $399.99 but will rise to $499.99 in August, Dell has the 512GB model on sale for $349.99, which is the current best deal. Target isn’t far behind, with the same console listed for $379.99, which may be worth it if you want to pick it up locally or have other discounts at Target like the Circle Card.

zh.title: 在价格上涨前获得折扣Xbox主机
zh.summary: 在微软因内存和存储价格飙升而在8月提高所有Xbox型号成本之前，Xbox Series S和Series X主机可以以折扣价格购买。目前的交易提供76-99美元的节省，Series X光盘版本降至573美元。

title: Instagram wants to monopolize your attention
summary: Instagram is expanding its smart TV app with vertical Reels, Stories, and horizontal video support, plus upcoming longform episodic content and TV-focused live experiences. The expansion aims to drive engagement on larger household screens.
content:
This week, Instagram launched a series of new features for its smart TV app that are all designed to get people to spend more time on the platform through the biggest screens in their homes. In addition to vertical Reels, Instagram for TV - which is currently available for Amazon Fire TV, Google TV, and Samsung Smart TVs - users can now watch disappearing Stories and horizontal videos with aspect ratios similar to what you typically see on YouTube. And soon, Instagram will make a big push for longform, episodic content and TV-focused "live creator experiences."
This foray into the TV space feels very different from the Meta-owned company's  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Instagram希望垄断你的注意力
zh.summary: Instagram正在扩展其智能电视应用，增加竖屏Reels、Stories和横屏视频支持，以及即将推出的长篇分集内容和以电视为中心的直播体验。这一扩展旨在推动更大家用屏幕上的用户参与度。

title: FCC may kill $2B program that connects schools and libraries to Internet
summary: The FCC may eliminate a $2 billion subsidy program that provides broadband internet access to schools and libraries, with Commissioner Carr citing screen time concerns. The program decision comes amid broader debate over internet funding priorities.
content: Carr cites screen time concerns, is accused of trying to be "the nation’s parent."

zh.title: FCC可能取消将学校和图书馆连接到互联网的20亿美元计划
zh.summary: FCC可能会取消一项20亿美元的补贴计划，该计划为学校和图书馆提供宽带互联网接入，委员Carr以屏幕时间问题为由。该计划决定是在关于互联网资金优先级的更广泛辩论中做出的。

title: RAMageddon just got extremely real
summary: Apple has raised prices across Macs, iPads, HomePods, and Vision Pro by hundreds of dollars, signaling a severe industry-wide RAM and component shortage. The increases at a company with Apple's supply chain influence indicate cost pressures affecting the entire tech hardware sector.
content:
Even Tim Cook couldn’t supply chain his way out of the RAM crisis. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

As far as prices go, Apple is kind of a reverse canary in the coal mine. 
With its famously generous margins and immense purchasing volume, it can afford to ride out price fluctuations in its supply chain in a way no other consumer tech company can. So when Apple raises prices across nearly all of its product lines, you know that shit is well and truly real.
That's what happened earlier today: Apple increased pricing across Macs, iPads, HomePods, and even the Vision Pro. Prices jumped hundreds of dollars in many cases. The MacBook Neo's key feature - a $599 starting price - is now $699. The iPhone appears to be safe for now, but I'd be sho …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: RAM灾难变得极其真实
zh.summary: Apple已经将Mac、iPad、HomePod和Vision Pro的价格提高了数百美元，预示着严重的行业范围内的RAM和组件短缺。在拥有Apple供应链影响力的公司中提高价格表明成本压力影响了整个科技硬件行业。

title: Polymarket says hackers stole users’ funds
summary: Polymarket, a major prediction market platform, disclosed that hackers stole user funds through a third-party breach. The platform is refunding affected users for the stolen cryptocurrency.
content: The prediction market giant Polymarket said it's refunding users who had funds stolen due to a third-party breach.

zh.title: Polymarket称黑客盗取用户资金
zh.summary: 主要预测市场平台Polymarket披露，黑客通过第三方漏洞盗取了用户资金。该平台正在向受影响的用户退还被盗的加密货币。

title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
summary: Microsoft is increasing prices for all Xbox console models in August due to memory and storage costs rising to 2.5 times previous levels. The price hikes continue an industrywide trend of hardware cost increases.
content: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

zh.title: Xbox效仿Apple提价
zh.summary: 由于内存和存储成本上升至之前的2.5倍，微软在8月份提高了所有Xbox主机型号的价格。这一价格上涨延续了硬件成本上升的行业趋势。

title: Notion Mail shuts down amid agent takeover
summary: Notion is discontinuing its Mail email service as users increasingly rely on the company's AI agents to manage email workflows. The shift reflects changing user preferences toward AI-powered productivity tools.
content: The company said it is discontinuing its email inbox in favor of its AI agent offering as users are increasingly handing over the reins of their email to the agents.

zh.title: Notion Mail在AI代理接管中关闭
zh.summary: 随着用户越来越依赖该公司的AI代理来管理电子邮件工作流，Notion正在停止其Mail电子邮件服务。这一转变反映了用户对AI驱动生产力工具偏好的变化。

title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
summary: Notion is discontinuing its email app as users increasingly prefer AI agents for inbox management instead. The shift marks Notion's strategic pivot toward agent-based workflows.
content: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."

zh.title: Notion停止运营电子邮件应用，因为大多数用户改用AI代理
zh.summary: 由于用户越来越倾向于使用AI代理进行收件箱管理，Notion正在停止其电子邮件应用。这一转变标志着Notion战略性地转向基于代理的工作流程。

title: The 16 best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
summary: Prime Day offers substantial discounts on robot vacuums across multiple brands and price points, from budget models like the Roborock Q10 S5 Plus at $239.99 to premium options with advanced features. The sales provide a good opportunity for consumers to purchase high-end cleaning equipment at reduced costs.
content:
The Roborock S10 S5 Plus has dropped to a new low price. | Image: Roborock	

If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. We’re now on day three of Prime Day, and Amazon, along with retailers like Best Buy and Walmart, is offering discounts on several models we’ve tested from brands like Roborock, Dreame, and Shark. Whether you’re looking for a basic robot vacuum that can cut down on the amount of vacuuming you have to do or a high-end model that can wash and dry its own mop pads and climb over room thresholds, there are deals available across a wide range of price points.
Roborock Saros 20

Where to Buy:

 $1599.99 $1424.99 at Amazon
 $1599.99 $1359.99 at Roborock

The Roborock Q10 S5 Plus is down to $239.99 ($310 off), which is a new low price, at Amazon. The Q10 S5 Plus is one of our favorite budget-friendly robot vacuum / mop hybrids, combining good AI-powered obstacle avoidance with automatic carpet detection. It also features a vibrating mop that does a solid job scrubbing hard floors while lifting itself over rugs, and the set includes a self-emptying dock for added convenience. It can’t match the suction power or tall threshold-climbing abilities of pricier models like the Saros 20, but this is a good value under $300.
Roborock Saros 10
Roborock’s Saros 10 combines powerful 22,000Pa suction with excellent dual spinning mop pads that do a great job tackling dried-on messes. It can also automatically leave its mop pads at the dock before vacuuming carpets. The newer Saros 20 offers more powerful suction and can tackle taller thresholds, but the Saros 10 is still a great cleaning machine.

Where to Buy:

 $1599.99 $999.99 at Best Buy
 $1599.99 $1299.99 at Roborock

The Tapo RV30 Max Plus is another excellent budget-friendly option that’s on sale. It includes a self-emptying dock and costs $199.99 ($200 off) at Amazon. You don’t get AI-powered obstacle avoida

zh.title: Prime Day期间提供的16个最佳扫地机器人优惠
zh.summary: Prime Day在多个品牌和价格范围内为扫地机器人提供大幅折扣，从Roborock Q10 S5 Plus等预算型号（239.99美元）到具有先进功能的高端选项。这些促销为消费者提供了以降低成本购买高端清洁设备的绝佳机会。

title: Google finally releases a Finance Android app, promises iOS version later in 2026
summary: Google has launched its Finance app on Android for the first time in 20 years, with AI features integrated into the tool and an iOS version promised later in 2026. The release marks Google's return to the personal finance app space with modern AI capabilities.
content: It took 20 years, but the Finance app arrives just in time to be packed full of AI.

zh.title: 谷歌终于发布安卓版财务应用，承诺2026年晚些时候推出iOS版本
zh.summary: 谷歌首次在20年后推出了安卓版财务应用，该应用集成了人工智能功能，并承诺在2026年晚些时候推出iOS版本。这次发布标志着谷歌以现代人工智能能力重返个人财务应用领域。

title: It’s a bad time to want a new computer
summary: Component shortages and "RAMaggeddon" are driving up hardware prices across computers, tablets, and gaming consoles, with new releases like Valve's Steam Machine nearly doubling in cost. Industry-wide price hikes suggest consumers should expect sustained expensive hardware for the foreseeable future.
content:
It's not exactly surprising that RAMaggeddon is making new tech hardware really expensive. But if you've been in the market for things like a new computer or tablet, this week has been filled with sticker shock. Given how many companies announced price hikes related to component shortages, it seems unlikely things will get cheaper any time soon.
Valve started the week off by finally revealing the price of the Steam Machine, its long-delayed, console-like PC that, in our tests, has performance on par with the PS5. It starts at $1,049, nearly double the price of the six-year-old PS5, and that's for the base configuration with 512GB of storage …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 现在不是购买新电脑的好时机
zh.summary: 芯片短缺和"内存危机"推高了电脑、平板和游戏机的硬件价格，Valve的Steam Machine等新品成本几乎翻倍。行业范围内的价格上涨表明消费者应该预期在可预见的未来硬件价格将持续高企。

title: You won’t have long to get these iPad deals before Apple’s price hike
summary: Apple raised iPad and MacBook prices, but retailers still have inventory at old prices with significant discounts temporarily available. Consumers should act quickly as discounts are disappearing and new pricing becomes standard.
content:
You can save hundreds on the latest iPad Air. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Apple just raised prices across its iPad and MacBook lineup. The good news is that many retailers are still selling their inventory at the old prices or far less, which means you can still score some of the best iPad deals we may see in awhile — if ever again. So if you’ve been thinking about picking up a new iPad, now is probably the time to do it.
Now the bad news: those discounts are starting to disappear, though. One of the best iPad deals of Prime Day, for instance, saw the M4-powered iPad Air with Wi-Fi and 128GB of storage drop to a record low of $519 when the sale kicked off. Amazon has since sold out, but Best Buy is still offering it for $519, which is $230 less than Apple’s new list price. You can also still buy it with LTE connectivity at Amazon for $699 ($200 off).
Apple iPad Air M4
The M4-powered iPad Air offers 12GB of RAM, Apple Intelligence features, Apple Pencil Pro support, and Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6, making it a great middle ground between the entry-level iPad and iPad Pro. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $899 $669 at Amazon (128GB, LTE)
 $749 $519.99 at Amazon (128GB, Wi-Fi)

Compared to Apple’s entry-level iPad, the Air offers a faster M4 chip, 12GB of RAM, Apple Intelligence features, Apple Pencil Pro support. It also offers newer connectivity standards like Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6, making it a more future-proof option.
If the iPad Air isn’t what you’re after, though, don’t worry. There are still plenty of other iPad deals worth considering, whether you’re shopping for Apple’s affordable entry-level model or its high-end iPad Pro. Here are the best discounts we could find.
iPad deals
iPad (2025)
Apple’s entry-level iPad is an excellent tablet for casual use, even if it is getting a little long in the tooth. Its high-res screen is great for watching video, and its A16 processor is still fast enough to handle light games and productivity apps. Read o

zh.title: 在苹果涨价前，你没有太多时间来抢购这些iPad优惠
zh.summary: 苹果提高了iPad和MacBook的价格，但零售商仍有旧价格库存，暂时可享受较大折扣。消费者应迅速行动，因为折扣正在消失，新定价将成为标准。

title: Anthropic says Alibaba must be punished for largest Claude cloning attack
summary: Anthropic claims Alibaba orchestrated the largest Claude model cloning attack by using 25,000 accounts to conduct 28.8 million exchanges extracting model knowledge. Anthropic is calling for regulatory punishment against Alibaba for the unauthorized model extraction.
content: Alibaba allegedly used 25,000 accounts to mine Claude over 28.8 million exchanges.

zh.title: Anthropic表示阿里巴巴必须为最大规模的Claude克隆攻击受到惩罚
zh.summary: Anthropic声称阿里巴巴组织了最大规模的Claude模型克隆攻击，使用25,000个账户进行了2,880万次交互以提取模型知识。Anthropic要求对阿里巴巴进行监管处罚，以追究其未经授权的模型提取行为。

title: Planet orbits so close to its star that their magnetic fields connect
summary: Astronomers have discovered a planet orbiting so close to its star that their magnetic fields directly connect, causing the star's chromosphere to brighten at specific points in the planet's orbit. The phenomenon reveals an extreme example of star-planet magnetic interaction.
content: At the right point of the orbit and stellar cycle, the star's chromosphere brightens.

zh.title: 行星距其恒星如此接近，以至于它们的磁场相连
zh.summary: 天文学家发现了一颗距其恒星极其接近的行星，它们的磁场直接相连，导致恒星的色球层在行星轨道的特定位置变亮。这一现象揭示了星-行星磁相互作用的极端例子。

title: Polestar has been muscled out of the US market
summary: Polestar is banned from selling electric vehicles in the US starting with model year 2027 after the Department of Commerce denied authorization due to rules blocking vehicles with Chinese software. The decision forces the Chinese-backed automaker to exit the US market.
content:
Polestar won't be allowed to sell its electric vehicles model year 2027 and beyond in the US after the federal government denied the company's request for authorization under a new rule banning vehicles with software from China.  
In a press release, the company says the decision to retreat from the US follows a recent decision by the Department of Commerce's Bureau of Industry and Security to not grant Polestar an authorization under the current Connected Vehicle Rule to sell vehicles from model year 2027 and beyond. The rule, which passed under the Biden administration, blocks the import and sale of any vehicle with software from "countri …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 极星被迫退出美国市场
zh.summary: 美国商务部因涉及中国软件的规则拒绝授权后，极星从2027年车型年起被禁止在美国销售电动汽车。这一决定迫使这家中国支持的汽车制造商退出美国市场。

title: a16z-backed Base Power is offering cheaper electricity to the power grid that needs it most
summary: Base Power is bypassing interconnection queue delays by deploying home batteries to provide backup grid services at cheaper rates. The venture-backed approach offers a faster alternative to traditional grid infrastructure expansion.
content: Base Power is skipping the PJM's troubled interconnection queue by placing its batteries at people's homes, offering backup services in exchange.

zh.title: a16z支持的Base Power向电网提供更便宜的电力
zh.summary: Base Power通过部署家用电池来绕过互联队列延迟，以更优惠的费率提供电网备用服务。这种风险投资支持的方法为传统电网基础设施扩展提供了更快的替代方案。

title: Here’s a bunch of Prime Day deals on keyboards, mice, and other peripherals we like
summary: While component shortages have driven up computer prices, peripherals like keyboards, mice, and monitors remain relatively affordable with significant Prime Day discounts. Consumers can find deals on accessories even as core computing hardware inflates.
content:
You can get a great, color-accurate 5K monitor for half the price of an Apple Studio Display. | Photo by John Higgins / The Verge	

RAMageddon has come for computers. The price of memory chips, hard drives, and solid state storage has skyrocketed. That’s led to price increases on desktop and laptop RAM, SSDs, spinning hard drives, and pretty much everything that uses any of those things. Consoles are more expensive. Desktops are more expensive. Laptops are more expensive. Tablets and phones are more expensive. Even MacBooks, which started out expensive but then started looking like a pretty good deal, just got more expensive. 
All that sucks. But if (if) there’s a silver lining, it’s that most of the stuff you plug into a computer — keyboards, mice, webcams, monitors, and so forth — isn’t getting bananas expensive. Actually, there are some good deals out there. 
Great keyboards on the cheap
8BitDo Retro 87 Mechanical Keyboard (Xbox Edition)
This mechanical keyboard is inspired by the original Xbox, with a translucent green color scheme and two large customizable buttons. Along with Bluetooth support, it offers a standard tenkeyless layout with clicky hot-swappable Kailh Jellyfish X switches.

Where to Buy:

 $119.99 $71.29 at Amazon
 $119.99 $71.99 at 8BitDo

Some of 8BitDo’s other Retro87 colors are on sale too, though it looks like it depends on the day. Right now the M Edition — which has an IBM Model M vibe — is down to $67.89, from $100. The Commodore 64, Famicom, and Super Nintendo-inspired colors aren’t on much of a sale as I type this, but they were yesterday, so keep an eye out. 
The 8BitDo 18-key Retro number pad comes in the same color options as the keyboard. It has Bluetooth and 2.4GHz wireless, plus a seven-segment display that lets it work as a standalone calculator. It’s down to $35.99ish, from $45ish, at Amazon. I (Nathan) bought one yesterday. 
The fairly new Keychron V5 Ultra mechanical keyboard with Silk POM red linear switches is $107.99 ($12 of

zh.title: Prime Day键盘、鼠标及其他外设优惠推荐
zh.summary: 虽然元器件短缺推高了电脑价格，但键盘、鼠标和显示器等外设仍保持相对实惠，Prime Day更是有大幅折扣。消费者可以在核心计算硬件价格上升之际抄底配件优惠。

title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
summary: Anthropic's Claude is increasingly winning over paid AI consumers despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead. The shift indicates growing preference for Claude among paying customers in a market previously dominated by OpenAI.
content: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

zh.title: Anthropic的Claude正在赢得付费消费者，这个市场曾被ChatGPT主导
zh.summary: 尽管ChatGPT拥有市场领先地位，Anthropic的Claude正在越来越多地赢得付费AI消费者。这种转变表明在之前由OpenAI主导的市场中，付费客户对Claude的偏好在不断增长。

title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
summary: General Intuition raised $320 million to develop AI trained on millions of hours of video gameplay, betting that action data from games can create AI with human-like intuition. The approach represents a novel training methodology for real-world AI applications.
content: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

zh.title: General Intuition 的 23 亿美元赌注：视频游戏可以训练现实世界的 AI 代理
zh.summary: General Intuition 融资 3.2 亿美元，用于开发基于数百万小时视频游戏训练的 AI。该公司押注游戏中的动作数据可以创造具有类人直觉的 AI。这种方法代表了现实世界 AI 应用的新型训练方法。

title: Xbox prices spike another $100 or more
summary: Microsoft is raising Xbox console prices by $100–$150 starting August 1st, citing a 2.5x surge in storage and memory costs with further doubling expected by fall 2027. The Series S will cost $499.99 while the 2TB model is being discontinued.
content:
Microsoft is increasing the prices of Xbox consoles again. Starting August 1st, 512GB models will be $100 more expensive, while 1TB models will be $150 more expensive. This means that the Xbox Series S will start at $499.99, the Xbox Series X without a disc drive will start at $749.99, and the Series X with a disc drive will start at $799.99. Microsoft also says it will be "sunsetting" its 2TB Xbox Series X.
Microsoft last raised prices in October by $20 to $70 and says it had hoped to avoid further hikes.  "Unfortunately, console storage and memory prices have increased by more than 2.5x and we expect another doubling by the fall of 2027," …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox 价格再次飙升 100 美元或更高
zh.summary: 微软从 8 月 1 日起将 Xbox 主机价格提高 100 至 150 美元，原因是存储和内存成本上升了 2.5 倍，预计到 2027 年秋季将进一步翻倍。Series S 的价格将达到 $499.99，而 2TB 型号将被停产。

title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
summary: A new image-generation tool from Databricks' former AI chief demonstrates how to reduce AI power consumption by 1,000x. The breakthrough could make AI systems significantly more efficient and sustainable.
content: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

zh.title: Databricks 前 AI 主管认为能将 AI 电费成本降低 1000 倍
zh.summary: Databricks 前 AI 首席推出的新型图像生成工具展示了如何将 AI 功耗降低 1000 倍。这一突破可能会使 AI 系统的效率大幅提高，更具可持续性。

title: Hacked Klue says criminals are deleting stolen customer data, but now other hackers are making threats
summary: Market research company Klue reported that the hacking group behind the customer data theft is deleting stolen information, but a second group of hackers is demanding ransom. The breach has attracted multiple threat actors seeking different outcomes.
content: Market research company Klue told customers that it believes the hacking group that stole their data is now deleting it. The company, however, warned about a second group of hackers wanting ransom.

zh.title: 被黑客入侵的Klue称犯罪分子正在删除被盗客户数据，但现在其他黑客正在发出勒索威胁
zh.summary: 市场研究公司Klue报告称，实施客户数据盗窃的黑客组织正在删除被盗信息，但第二个黑客组织正在要求赎金。这次数据泄露吸引了多个具有不同目的的威胁行为人。

title: Rippling now wants to be your entire data stack
summary: Rippling is expanding beyond HR to become a comprehensive data platform, with employees using AI tools like Claude for calendar and email analysis. The company is positioning itself as an all-in-one data and business operations solution.
content: "There were employees doing things like, 'Claude is so helpful for me — it analyzes my calendar and my email and puts together a plan for me,'" he says. "That person was spending at a run rate of $30,000 a year for this."

zh.title: Rippling现在想要成为你的整个数据栈
zh.summary: Rippling正在扩展超越人力资源，成为一个全面的数据平台，员工使用Claude等AI工具进行日历和电子邮件分析。该公司将自己定位为一个一体化的数据和业务运营解决方案。

title: Google Finance gets a dedicated app for Android
summary: Google launched a dedicated Finance app for Android featuring watchlist access, real-time market data, and an AI-powered "Key Moments" feature that explains stock movements. The app consolidates financial tools in a unified mobile experience.
content: Users will be able to access their watchlists, real-time market data, live financial news, and Google's AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, which explains why stocks moved.

zh.title: Google Finance为Android推出专属应用
zh.summary: 谷歌为Android推出了一个专用的金融应用，具有监视列表访问、实时市场数据和AI驱动的"关键时刻"功能，可以解释股票走势。该应用在统一的移动体验中整合了金融工具。

title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
summary: Netris raised $15 million in Series A funding to expand network switch software that accelerates neocloud deployment. The platform helps cloud operators reduce time-to-market for AI infrastructure buildouts.
content: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

zh.title: Netris从a16z融资1500万美元A轮，加快AI新云上线
zh.summary: Netris完成1500万美元A轮融资，扩展网络交换机软件以加速新云部署。该平台帮助云运营商缩短AI基础设施构建的上市时间。

title: Trump admin bars Polestar from selling its new EVs in the US
summary: The Trump administration's Department of Commerce declined to authorize Polestar for US EV sales due to rules blocking vehicles with Chinese software. The decision effectively bars the Chinese-owned automaker from the US market.
content: The Department of Commerce declined to give the Chinese-owned automaker a special authorization to keep selling EVs in the U.S.

zh.title: 特朗普政府禁止沃尔沃极星在美国销售新款电动汽车
zh.summary: 特朗普政府商务部以禁止搭载中国软件车辆的规定为由，拒绝授权沃尔沃极星在美国销售电动汽车。该决定实际上将这家中国拥有的汽车制造商挡在了美国市场之外。

title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices, spares iPhone for now
summary: Apple raised prices across MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, iPad Air, and iPad Pro models while leaving iPhone pricing unchanged for now. The selective increases reflect broader supply chain pressures from component shortages.
content: Apple raises prices of MacBook Air and Pro along with iPad Air and Pro.

zh.title: 苹果提高Mac和iPad价格，暂时保持iPhone价格不变
zh.summary: 苹果提高了MacBook Air、MacBook Pro、iPad Air和iPad Pro机型的价格，同时暂时保持iPhone定价不变。这些有选择性的涨价反映了零部件短缺带来的更广泛的供应链压力。

title: Feds deny Polestar authorization to sell cars in US from model year 2027
summary: U.S. federal regulators have denied Polestar authorization to sell vehicles domestically from model year 2027 onward, contrasting with approval granted to parent company Volvo. The decision restricts Polestar's ability to compete in the American automotive market.
content: Unlike with Volvo, there will be no authorization for Polestar to sell its cars here.

zh.title: 联邦政府拒绝Polestar授权2027年型号在美国销售汽车
zh.summary: 美国联邦监管机构拒绝了Polestar从2027年型号起在国内销售汽车的授权，这与批准其母公司沃尔沃的情况形成对比。该决定限制了Polestar在美国汽车市场的竞争能力。

title: Apple ratchets up prices, blames the cost of memory
summary: Apple has increased prices on multiple Mac and iPad models by hundreds of dollars, attributing the increases to rising memory component costs. The price hikes represent a significant adjustment across Apple's premium hardware lineup.
content: Some Macs are hundreds of dollars more expensive today than yesterday.

zh.title: Apple大幅提价，归咎于内存成本上升
zh.summary: Apple已将多款Mac和iPad型号的价格提高了数百美元，将涨价归咎于内存芯片成本上升。这些价格上调代表了Apple整个高端硬件产品线的重大调整。

title: 2 days left to save up to $190: Join 1,000+ founders and investors at TechCrunch Founder Summit
summary: TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 is offering Early Bird registration discounts of up to $190 through June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT, with over 1,000 founders and investors expected to attend. Registration closes soon as early-bird pricing expires.
content: Two days left to lock in your spot at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 and save up to $190 before Early Bird rates expire on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

zh.title: 仅剩2天省到$190：加入1000多位创始人和投资者参加TechCrunch创始人峰会
zh.summary: TechCrunch创始人峰会2026正在提供早鸟注册折扣，最多可省$190，截止至6月26日太平洋时间晚上11:59，预计将有1000多位创始人和投资者参加。随着早鸟优惠价格即将过期，注册将很快关闭。

title: Trump administration proposes axing brake-pedal requirement for AVs in a boost for Tesla
summary: The Trump administration's Department of Transportation is proposing to eliminate brake-pedal requirements for vehicles designed for fully autonomous operation, a regulatory change that would benefit Tesla and other AV developers. The proposal aims to streamline regulations for self-driving technology.
content: The Department of Transportation wants to remove the brake-pedal requirement for vehicles "designed to be driven exclusively by automated driving systems."

zh.title: 特朗普政府提议取消自动驾驶汽车制动踏板要求
zh.summary: 特朗普政府交通运输部门提议取消为完全自主运行设计的车辆的制动踏板要求，这项监管变化将有利于特斯拉和其他自动驾驶开发商。该提议旨在简化自动驾驶技术的监管框架。

title: The "sad inevitability" of Europe's heat wave
summary: Europe is experiencing its second major heat wave of summer 2026, with experts describing extreme temperatures as an increasingly predictable and "sad inevitability" linked to climate change. The back-to-back heat waves demonstrate patterns of escalating seasonal heat events.
content: Europeans are baking under their second heat wave of the summer.

zh.title: 欧洲热浪的"悲哀必然性"
zh.summary: 欧洲正在经历2026年夏季的第二波大规模热浪，专家们将极端温度描述为与气候变化相关的日益可预见的"悲哀必然性"。连续的热浪显示了季节性热事件不断升级的模式。

title: New effort will get genome sequences for entire Endangered Species list
summary: Colossal Biosciences is launching an initiative to sequence the complete genomes of all species listed on the Endangered Species list while collecting and biobanking tissue samples. The effort aims to preserve genetic information for future conservation and potential de-extinction research.
content: Colossal Biosciences will be biobanking tissues from all of them as well.

zh.title: 新项目将为整个濒危物种名单获取基因组序列
zh.summary: 巨型生物科学公司正在启动一项计划，对濒危物种名单上列出的所有物种进行完整基因组测序，同时收集和保存组织样本。该项目旨在为未来保护和潜在的物种复活研究保存遗传信息。

title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
summary: Adobe has acquired Topaz Labs, a developer of AI-powered image and video enhancement tools, with plans to integrate the technology across its creative applications. The acquisition expands Adobe's AI capabilities in photo and video editing.
content: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

zh.title: Adobe收购图像和视频增强工具制造商Topaz Labs
zh.summary: Adobe已收购AI驱动的图像和视频增强工具开发商Topaz Labs，计划将该技术整合到其创意应用程序中。这项收购扩展了Adobe在照片和视频编辑方面的AI能力。

title: Every Homo naledi we know of is female, and the implications are fascinating
summary: All known specimens of Homo naledi discovered to date are female, puzzling paleoanthropologists who see no natural explanation for the absence of male remains. The discovery raises significant questions about fossil preservation patterns and ancient hominid population dynamics.
content: "There is no natural explanation," says paleoanthropologist John Hawks.

zh.title: 我们已知的每一个纳莱迪人都是女性，其含义令人着迷
zh.summary: 迄今为止发现的所有已知纳莱迪人标本都是女性，这使古人类学家感到困惑，他们看不到没有发现男性遗骸的自然解释。这一发现对化石保存模式和古人科动物种群动态提出了重大问题。

title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
summary: Amazon is investing $13 billion in AI infrastructure in India as global tech companies race to expand their presence in the country's growing AI market.
content: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

zh.title: 亚马逊向印度追加130亿美元人工智能基础设施投资
zh.summary: 随着全球科技公司争相在印度蓬勃发展的人工智能市场中扩展业务，亚马逊正在印度投资130亿美元用于人工智能基础设施。

title: Disney agrees to pay $50 million to YouTube TV and DirecTV subscribers
summary: Disney has agreed to pay $50 million to settle a class action lawsuit alleging it forced YouTube TV and DirecTV Stream to raise subscription prices; eligible subscribers can submit claims by September 8th, 2026.
content:
The final settlement hearing will take place on January 14th, 2027. | Image: The Verge	

YouTube TV and DirecTV Stream customers may be eligible for a cash payout, after Disney agreed to pay $50 million to settle claims that it forced the services to increase their subscription prices. Anyone who was subscribed to YouTube TV or DirecTV Stream between April 1st, 2019, and March 31st, 2026 is eligible to claim under the proposed settlement agreement.
All claims must be submitted to the online settlement portal by September 8th, 2026, and you can find more information regarding claim eligibility in this court authorized notice. There's no mention of how big the payout could be per user, but payments are expected to be distributed  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 迪士尼同意向YouTube TV和DirecTV用户支付5000万美元
zh.summary: 迪士尼已同意支付5000万美元，以解决一项指控其强制YouTube TV和DirecTV Stream用户提高订阅价格的集体诉讼；符合条件的订户可在2026年9月8日前提交索赔。

title: The 124 best tech deals for day three of Prime Day
summary: The Verge rounds up the best tech deals from day three of Amazon Prime Day, featuring discounts on smart home devices, TVs, and electronics at or near all-time lows across multiple categories.
content:
It’s day three of Prime Day, folks. We’re nearly 75 percent of the way through Amazon’s four-day sales event, and unsurprisingly, many deals are still sticking around. There have been all kinds of discounts on things like TVs, smart home gadgets, chargers, headphones, and more.
Prime Day typically isn’t as big of a deal as Black Friday, but it’s a chance to get some solid discounts on tech purchases both large and small. Many items are at or near their all-time low prices, and in the case of things that got more expensive this year due to RAMageddon it can be a chance to nab them at their old prices.
Be sure to check out all our coverage, which we are thoroughly checking and updating throughout all four days of Prime Day. But no roundup gets the same care and attention as our main roundup you see here. Our whole team pitches in on this one, so it’s our most varied, wide-ranging, and largest collection of deals. If you see it in any of our coverage, you know it’s something we’ve tested or owned and feel comfortable recommending.
Smart home deals
Echo Show 8 (2025)
The updated Echo Show 8 features an 8.7-inch display with 720p resolution, wider viewing angles, and higher contrast. It includes a 13-megapixel camera, new stereo speakers, and supports Alexa Plus, while doubling as a smart home hub with support for Zigbee, Matter, and Thread. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $179.99 $124.99 at Amazon
 $179.99 at Best Buy
 $179.99 at Target

Amazon’s Echo Show 11 is on sale for $149.99 ($80 off) at Amazon, which marks its best price to date. It’s almost identical to the Echo Show 8, except that it offers a larger and sharper 1080p resolution.
You can buy the latest Echo Show 5 for $59.99 ($30 off) at Amazon, which is one of its better prices in recent months though $20 shy of its all-time low. The smart display also works with Alexa Plus, but it’s smaller than the Echo Show 8 with less robust sound, and better suited for small table tops or office desks.
Philips Hue smart

zh.title: Prime Day第三天的124个最佳科技优惠
zh.summary: The Verge整理了Prime Day第三天最佳的科技交易清单，包括智能家居设备、电视和电子产品的折扣，这些折扣处于或接近多个类别的历史最低价。

title: Is this solar e-bike a good idea or sophisticated e-waste?
summary: The Verge reviews the Phosgo Go5 solar e-bike, marketed as the world's first AI solar e-bike, and raises serious red flags about the company's legitimacy and the product's viability despite claims to eliminate range anxiety.
content:
Tempting, isn’t it? | Image: Phosgo	

I like the idea of a solar-powered electric bike, but I don't think anyone should buy the new Phosgo Go5 - not yet, anyway. This "world's first AI solar e-bike" promises to "eliminate range anxiety," and is sold by a new brand out of China hoping to make a big splash by selling direct-to-consumer through a global crowdfunding campaign. So many red flags here.
According to a media kit the company sent me from a generic gmail.com address, Phosgo is a joint venture between Jiaxing Dazhe Solar Energy and Shenzhen Honglianda Technology. Dazhe provides the flexible solar technology pioneered by someone identified only as "Dr. Li," while Hongliand …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这款太阳能电动自行车是个好主意还是精心包装的电子废弃物？
zh.summary: The Verge评测了Phosgo Go5太阳能电动自行车，该产品被宣传为全球首款AI太阳能电动自行车，但评测指出了该公司合法性和产品可行性的严重问题，尽管它声称可以消除续航焦虑。

title: IBM claims world’s first sub-1 nanometer chip technology
summary: IBM claims to have developed the world's first sub-1 nanometer chip technology using nanostack transistors that could improve chip performance or significantly reduce energy consumption.
content: IBM’s nanostack transistors could boost chip performance or energy efficiency.

zh.title: IBM声称开发出世界首款1纳米以下芯片技术
zh.summary: IBM声称已开发出世界首款1纳米以下芯片技术，采用纳米堆晶体管，可以改进芯片性能或显著降低能耗。

title: Cellebrite said it cut off Russia, but Russia used is tools anyway
summary: Security researchers found evidence that Russian authorities used Cellebrite's phone-unlocking tools to hack the iPhone of a political opponent, contradicting the company's claims of cutting off sales to Russia.
content: Security researchers found evidence that Russian authorities hacked the iPhone of a political opponent using a phone-unlocking device made by Cellebrite, even after the company said it would stop selling to Putin’s government.

zh.title: Cellebrite称已切断对俄罗斯的服务，但俄罗斯仍在使用其工具
zh.summary: 安全研究人员发现证据显示俄罗斯当局使用了Cellebrite的手机解锁工具来侵入政治反对派的iPhone，这与该公司声称已切断对俄罗斯销售的说法相矛盾。

title: Facebook’s Creator Studio has been revived as an AI companion app
summary: Meta has revived Facebook Creator Studio as a standalone AI companion app that uses AI-powered insights and automated features to help creators grow their audiences and manage engagement.
content:
This is what the new Creator Studio app looks like, after the original service was shuttered in 2023. | Image: Meta	

Meta is bringing back the Facebook Creator Studio page manager, now "reimagined" as a standalone AI companion app. The new app aims to make it easier for creators to connect with their audiences and show them "exactly how to grow on Facebook," according to Meta's announcement.
Meta's AI Creator Assistant is a central focus of the newly reimagined app - users can ask the chatbot to provide performance tracking insights and tailored recommendations for improving engagement. It can also be used to find "the most important comments" left by the user's audience and "instantly draft replies in your voice."
The Creator Studio app isn't widely ava …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Facebook创意工作室作为AI伴侣应用重新推出
zh.summary: Meta已将Facebook创意工作室重新推出为独立的AI伴侣应用，该应用利用AI驱动的洞察和自动化功能帮助创作者扩大受众并管理用户互动。

title: Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
summary: European chipmaker ASML's CEO revealed that China can only purchase older-generation semiconductor equipment due to US export restrictions, complicating Washington's tech competition strategy. The disclosure underscores tensions between US protectionism and European trade concerns in the global chip industry.
content: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off limits.

zh.title: 欧洲反击华盛顿的芯片战争
zh.summary: 欧洲芯片制造商ASML的首席执行官披露，由于美国的出口限制，中国只能购买上一代半导体设备，这使华盛顿的技术竞争战略变得复杂化。这一披露突出了美国保护主义与欧洲贸易关注之间的紧张关系以及全球芯片产业的矛盾。
